chapter_title.en: Chapter on Livelihoods, Earnings, Profits, and Professions

text: سَدِيرٌ اَلصَّيْرَفِيُّ : قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَيُّ شَيْءٍ عَلَى اَلرَّجُلِ فِي طَلَبِ اَلرِّزْقِ فَقَالَ "يَا سَدِيرُ إِذَا فَتَحْتَ بَابَكَ وَ بَسَطْتَ بِسَاطَكَ فَقَدْ قَضَيْتَ مَا عَلَيْكَ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3607 - Sadir Al-Sayrafi said:
I asked Abu Abdullah (as): "What is required of a man in seeking sustenance?"
Imam (as) replied: "O Sadir, if you open your door and spread your mat, then you have fulfilled what is required of you."
